overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy cyberpunk city waterfront at night. The player character walks along a sidewalk next to a busy road with elevated highways overhead, passing pedestrians before stopping to admire the neon-lit skyline across the water. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity graphics and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city street beneath elevated highway

events.description: futuristic white sports car with glowing red taillights passes by on the left
pedestrian in reflective blue jacket passes close to camera on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to traffic, approaching pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving past on the wet road, red taillights glowing

entered.detail: massive curved concrete overpass with thick support pillars spanning the road
tall black pole with traffic signal equipment and overhead lights
green palm fronds hanging down into the upper right of frame
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible through rain and atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked city sidewalk beneath massive elevated highways. Vehicles including a white sports car pass by on the left while pedestrians approach from ahead. The scene is illuminated by streetlights and the glow of distant neon signs through the heavy rain.

events.description: moving from street section to waterfront area with visible railing and water
passing closely by a woman in a black dress leaning against the railing

agents.ego_description: walking past pedestrians who are standing and leaning on the waterfront railing, looking out at the water

notable_agents.action: woman in black dress and silver boots leaning against concrete railing, looking at the water

entered.detail: gray concrete barrier with vertical rectangular cutouts separating sidewalk from water
dark calm water surface reflecting the city lights and overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the waterfront promenade, passing pedestrians who stand leaning against the concrete railing overlooking the water. The elevated highway curves overhead while the dark water reflects the city lights. The camera moves past a woman in a black dress and others observing the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront overlook with panoramic city view

events.description: camera stops walking and begins slow pan to the right across the water
view opens up to reveal full neon-lit cityscape and waterfront buildings on the right

agents.ego_description: stopped at the railing, slowly panning right to take in the panoramic view of the neon city across the water

entered.detail: cluster of high-rise buildings with bright purple and white neon signage and illuminated windows
row of palm trees lining the distant waterfront promenade with purple lighting

segments.scene_description: Stopping at the waterfront railing, the camera pans slowly to the right, revealing a panoramic view of the neon-lit cyberpunk skyline across the water. The elevated highway recedes to the left as the view opens up to show palm trees, brightly lit buildings with purple neon signage, and the expansive dark water surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic urban corridor beneath massive highways toward an expansive, neon-lit waterfront vista. It begins by walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk where streetlights and distant neon signs illuminate passing vehicles and oncoming pedestrians. As the camera continues along the promenade, the oppressive concrete of the curving elevated highway overhead begins to give way to the open air of the waterfront, passing by figures leaning against a railing. The scene then shifts from forward motion to a slow pan to the right as the camera stops at the water's edge. This final movement reveals a panoramic skyline across the dark, reflective water, where the urban density recedes to uncover palm trees and towering buildings glowing with purple neon signage.
